name: Hulmes Transportation Svc LTD
registry_source: MA Secretary of State (per BBB/third-party reporting); 15 Bridge St, Belchertown, MA 01007 + 75 South Church St, Pittsfield, MA
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record matches 'HULMES TRANSPORTATION' or 'HULMES TRANSPORT' - only unrelated 'S T HULMES & SONS EXCAVATING' (USDOT 3174536) appears. Likely intrastate-only operator. Family-owned and operated since 1977; entity incorporated 1987.

name: Service Bus Tours
inc_date: 1961-01-01 (Service Bus per BBB; Selby Bus II Corp filed later)
registry_source: NY Dept of State (Selby Bus II Corp / Selby Bus IV Corp / Selby Bus V Corp all at 756 Nepperhan Ave); BBB lists Service Bus Company Inc started 1937, incorporated 1961
notes: Service Bus Tours / Service Tours brand at 756 Nepperhan Ave does NOT have a USDOT under that exact name. Operating carrier at this address is SELBY BUS II CORP (USDOT 3907153, MC-1441170, 73 PUs, 179 drivers, Satisfactory 04/18/2025) - same family-owned SuperSelby/Selby group. Also affiliated: SELBY BUS IV CORP (USDOT 3753645, MC-703953, 87 PUs, 181 drivers) and SELBY BUS V CORP (filed 06/14/2021). Service Tours operating since 1939 (charter/tours brand); Selby is the school-bus/charter operating arm.

name: Kelly's Transit
inc_date: 1978 (founding year per company; PA corporate filing date not confirmed)
registry_source: PA Dept of State Bureau of Corporations (KELLY TRANSIT, INC. profile per D&B); PA Public Utility Commission references in PA Bulletin; 10 N Main St, Dover, PA 17315
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record matches Kelly's Transit / Kelly Transit at Dover PA address. Note: USDOT 1453343 (Kelly's Transportation Services Inc) is a Texas company at 5618 Upper Lake Dr, Humble TX 77346 with only 1 PU/2 drivers - NOT the PA entity. Likely intrastate-only. Company operates as a contractor to Lincoln Intermediate Unit No. 12 for special-needs student transportation since 1978; ~700 students across 25+ school districts in York/Adams Counties; 80+ drivers. Also operates 24-bed detention center.
